creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
I noticed that the pcvt(4) man page talks references pc(4):

     The pcvt driver provides a virtual screen system with several
     additional features not available in pc(4) standard console device
     driver.                                                           

However there is no pc(4) man page.

How-To-Repeat: 
RTFM pcvt(4)
